title: nonea pulla
intro: Nonea pulla, also known as purple dead nettle, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the mint family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like iron and calcium, offering several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Nonea pulla can be consumed as teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
